TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_sazikuzay_a_nikalabi, title = sazikuzay_a_nikalabi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/sazikuzay_a_nikalabi} }

S.FORM: śúÄŚĺĆÁöĄśôöť§ź"(Áĺ©Ś§ßŚą©Ť™ě:Il Cenacolo (il t Ée'naňźkolo) , L'Ultima Cena ('lultima 't Éeňźna)) . "sazikuzay a nikalabi" I-ta-li a kamu, Il Cenacolo (il t Ée'naňźkolo) , L'Ultima Cena ('lultima 't Éeňźna) u katinengan nu tademaw tabakiay a nikulitan tu nu cabengay, nilimaan nisulitan kacumelakan a mihcaan ci Aw-na-tu.Ta.wen-si mikulit i Mi-lan kingsikiw manamuh ci Ma-li-yaan tuw-min-wou-huy-yen a pikanan a cabengan. 1980 a mihcaan, nikulitan "sazikuzay a nikalabi" tu kanamu ci Ma-li-yaan mapasisil u zaysang nu kitakit. misanga tu likisiŚČĶšĹúś≠∑ŚŹ≤ 463 a mihcaan u misangaay patizengay a saydan ci Su-la-li misakapah patizeng manamuh tu kanamuhan a Ma-li-ya a to-min wo-huy-yen. 470 a ziday kakitaan ci Lu-to-wi-ke.S-bu-al-ca, paahebal patizeng tu kalecapuan. kakitan miawza tu itawyaay 28 ku mihcaan mikutikay Ta-wen-si atu zumaay a tademaw ci Mi-lan-nu misanga'ay patizengay a saydan ci Pow-la-mung-te mapulung miseyki, ci Pow-la-mung-te u kalecapuan nu pangkiw a kasamulmul nu zikuza nu luma' sumad han u talakaway a ainulian. zuma satu macusnus aca patizeng tu masasepatay a kalimucu' a salining, pikanan. 495 a mihcaan katukuh 1497 a mihcaan kaiza kakitaan ci Lu-to-wi-ke-Wang-wiy nupakazali i sasingalana, ci Ta-wen-si mipili' tu pikanan amisan a cabeng misa nga' mikulit tu nipaliayaw niza u matenesay tu a nikulitan u "sazikuzay a nikalabi", pasu u sapikulit a kulit nisanga'an niza, nu malalamelay a kuli atu kulitay a ti'kuk nu malalamela a sapikulit, acaay ku nu tebanay a kasumamadan a mihcaan hatu u mahiniay ku maiyungay u masenget ku sasakulitan mikulit tu cabengay. uyni a sakulit mapalalamel tu nu zumaay, u sakatineng u ti'kuk atu nguling, atu ci Ta-wen-si duhepic ku nipakulit, u "sazikuzay a nikalabi" i zikuz nu 50 a mihcaan zayhan malalemed amalingatu pihaceng ku katupelak, u picudadan tu nu kiwkayay sadakaydakay kinapina tu misakapah misanga' tuyni a nikulitan. 796 . 1652 a mihcaan i kalecapuan i cabengan misazazan tu adidi'ay a panan, namahiza i nikulitanay a YE-su atu tuluay nu mikilulay a kuku' ketunen tu. 796 a mihcaan Ba-kow a kangangayawan, Na-pow-lunay Ba-kow a hitay micalap tu Mi-lan, kalecapuan macalap nu Ba-lan-si u saayaway a masakaputay kapulungan a hitay nu kanatal, u nisulutan uyni a pikanan mala luma' tunu sumayu. 1943 a mihcaan sakatusa a ngangayawan, Mi-lan mapung nu makakanumay a hitay, malemeday a kalecapuan caay ka hamin mapeleng, amiading tu nikulitan, Ba-si-s I-tali a hitayan atu binawlan u nitabuan a liken, angngulu, sapad hamin nu cabeng masakapah tu miading, nazikuz namangangayaw misakapah masanga' ku maluyuhay nu zumaay a luma' zikuz, kya muliyaw pabinawlan tuynian a nikulitan. ayza a demiad miazihay tuniann nikulitan amaazih tu ku nu tawyaay niciluan a sasing. 1982 a mihcaan I-ta-li patizeng tu milisimetay misakapah a sakaput, i pipadang nu Olivetti, malingatu miyung tu nu ke-sya a kikay sapiedap mibanaw misakapah tu "sazikuzay a nikalabi", mitelungay misakapahay milekakawaway misakapahay ci Mi-lan u kucungay s cyaw-sow ci Pi-lin.Pu-la-mu-pi-la "Pinin Brambilla Barcilon". uyni a kawaw kanahatu pakaedem tu hekalay a tademaw katedes nu kakaydihan, nika a malilid nu kucungay amacaculi ku zuma, sisa matenes ku pisakapah, katukuh 1999 a mihcaan 3 a bulad kya muliya pabinawlan paazih tuyni a nikulitan. 2000 a mihcaan "sazikuzay a nikalabi" caay piuwac misakapah misanga', u hekalay sangalenb sa macaculi, uzuma miciliay nasa uyni nikulitan takelal tatu ku nibanawan, u kucungay misulitay tu likisi atu misulitay tu kiwkay tu nisakapahan misanga' tu nikulitanay maazih yadah ku masazumaay a zazan.
S.PHON: *****"(****:ir~…ĺ ¶…ôna ¶or~…ĺo (ir~…ĺ t*…ô Ē~ °na*kor~…ĺo) , r~…ĺ Ē~ °ur~…ĺtima ¶…ôna ( Ē~ °r~…ĺur~…ĺtima Ē~ °t*…ô*na)) . "sazikuzaj a nikar~…ĺabi" i-ta-r~…ĺi a kamu, ir~…ĺ ¶…ôna ¶or~…ĺo (ir~…ĺ t*…ô Ē~ °na*kor~…ĺo) , r~…ĺ Ē~ °ur~…ĺtima ¶…ôna ( Ē~ °r~…ĺur~…ĺtima Ē~ °t*…ô*na) u katin…ôŇčan nu tad…ômaw tabakiaj a nikur~…ĺitan tu nu ¶ab…ôŇčaj, nir~…ĺimaan nisur~…ĺitan ka ¶um…ôr~…ĺakan a mińß ¶aan ¶i aw-na-tu.ta.w…ôn-si mikur~…ĺit i mi-r~…ĺan kiŇčsikiw manamuńß ¶i ma-r~…ĺi-jaan tuw-min-wou-ńßuj-j…ôn a pikanan a ¶ab…ôŇčan. **** a mińß ¶aan, nikur~…ĺitan "sazikuzaj a nikar~…ĺabi" tu kanamu ¶i ma-r~…ĺi-jaan mapasisir~…ĺ u zajsaŇč nu kitakit. misaŇča tu r~…ĺikisi**** *** a mińß ¶aan u misaŇčaaj patiz…ôŇčaj a sajdan ¶i su-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺi misakapańß patiz…ôŇč manamuńß tu kanamuńßan a ma-r~…ĺi-ja a to-min wo-ńßuj-j…ôn. *** a zidaj kakitaan ¶i r~…ĺu-to-wi-k…ô.s-bu-ar~…ĺ- ¶a, paańß…ôbar~…ĺ patiz…ôŇč tu kar~…ĺ…ô ¶apuan. kakitan miawza tu itawjaaj ** ku mińß ¶aan mikutikaj ta-w…ôn-si atu zumaaj a tad…ômaw ¶i mi-r~…ĺan-nu misaŇča Ē~ °aj patiz…ôŇčaj a sajdan ¶i pow-r~…ĺa-muŇč-t…ô mapur~…ĺuŇč mis…ôki, ¶i pow-r~…ĺa-muŇč-t…ô u kar~…ĺ…ô ¶apuan nu paŇčkiw a kasamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ nu zikuza nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sumad ńßan u tar~…ĺakawaj a ainur~…ĺian. zuma satu ma ¶usnus a ¶a patiz…ôŇč tu masas…ôpataj a kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° a sar~…ĺiniŇč, pikanan. *** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan kaiza kakitaan ¶i r~…ĺu-to-wi-k…ô-waŇč-wij nupakazar~…ĺi i sasiŇčar~…ĺana, ¶i ta-w…ôn-si mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu pikanan amisan a ¶ab…ôŇč misa Ňča Ē~ ° mikur~…ĺit tu nipar~…ĺiajaw niza u mat…ôn…ôsaj tu a nikur~…ĺitan u "sazikuzaj a nikar~…ĺabi", pasu u sapikur~…ĺit a kur~…ĺit nisaŇča Ē~ °an niza, nu mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj a kur~…ĺi atu kur~…ĺitaj a ti Ē~ °kuk nu mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺa a sapikur~…ĺit, a ¶aaj ku nu t…ôbanaj a kasumamadan a mińß ¶aan ńßatu u mańßiniaj ku maijuŇčaj u mas…ôŇč…ôt ku sasakur~…ĺitan mikur~…ĺit tu ¶ab…ôŇčaj. ujni a sakur~…ĺit mapar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu nu zumaaj, u sakatin…ôŇč u ti Ē~ °kuk atu Ňčur~…ĺiŇč, atu ¶i ta-w…ôn-si duńß…ôpi ¶ ku nipakur~…ĺit, u "sazikuzaj a nikar~…ĺabi" i zikuz nu ** a mińß ¶aan zajńßan mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd amar~…ĺiŇčatu pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku katup…ôr~…ĺak, u pi ¶udadan tu nu kiwkajaj sadakajdakaj kinapina tu misakapańß misaŇča Ē~ ° tujni a nikur~…ĺitan. *** . **** a mińß ¶aan i kar~…ĺ…ô ¶apuan i ¶ab…ôŇčan misazazan tu adidi Ē~ °aj a panan, namańßiza i nikur~…ĺitanaj a j…ô-su atu tur~…ĺuaj nu mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj a kuku Ē~ ° k…ôtun…ôn tu. *** a mińß ¶aan ba-kow a kaŇčaŇčajawan, na-pow-r~…ĺunaj ba-kow a ńßitaj mi ¶ar~…ĺap tu mi-r~…ĺan, kar~…ĺ…ô ¶apuan ma ¶ar~…ĺap nu ba-r~…ĺan-si u saajawaj a masakaputaj kapur~…ĺuŇčan a ńßitaj nu kanatar~…ĺ, u nisur~…ĺutan ujni a pikanan mar~…ĺa r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tunu sumaju. **** a mińß ¶aan sakatusa a ŇčaŇčajawan, mi-r~…ĺan mapuŇč nu makakanumaj a ńßitaj, mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj a kar~…ĺ…ô ¶apuan ¶aaj ka ńßamin map…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč, amiadiŇč tu nikur~…ĺitan, ba-si-s i-tar~…ĺi a ńßitajan atu binawr~…ĺan u nitabuan a r~…ĺik…ôn, aŇčŇčur~…ĺu, sapad ńßamin nu ¶ab…ôŇč masakapańß tu miadiŇč, nazikuz namaŇčaŇčajaw misakapańß masaŇča Ē~ ° ku mar~…ĺujuńßaj nu zumaaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° zikuz, kja mur~…ĺijaw pabinawr~…ĺan tujnian a nikur~…ĺitan. ajza a d…ômiad miazińßaj tuniann nikur~…ĺitan amaazińß tu ku nu tawjaaj ni ¶ir~…ĺuan a sasiŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan i-ta-r~…ĺi patiz…ôŇč tu mir~…ĺisim…ôtaj misakapańß a sakaput, i pipadaŇč nu or~…ĺi*…ôtti, mar~…ĺiŇčatu mijuŇč tu nu k…ô-sja a kikaj sapi…ôdap mibanaw misakapańß tu "sazikuzaj a nikar~…ĺabi", mit…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj misakapańßaj mir~…ĺ…ôkakawawaj misakapańßaj ¶i mi-r~…ĺan u ku ¶uŇčaj s ¶jaw-sow ¶i pi-r~…ĺin.pu-r~…ĺa-mu-pi-r~…ĺa "pinin brambir~…ĺr~…ĺa bar ¶ir~…ĺon". ujni a kawaw kanańßatu paka…ôd…ôm tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw kat…ôd…ôs nu kakajdińßan, nika a mar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu ku ¶uŇčaj ama ¶a ¶ur~…ĺi ku zuma, sisa mat…ôn…ôs ku pisakapańß, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad kja mur~…ĺija pabinawr~…ĺan paazińß tujni a nikur~…ĺitan. **** a mińß ¶aan "sazikuzaj a nikar~…ĺabi" ¶aaj piuwa ¶ misakapańß misaŇča Ē~ °, u ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj saŇčar~…ĺ…ônb sa ma ¶a ¶ur~…ĺi, uzuma mi ¶ir~…ĺiaj nasa ujni nikur~…ĺitan tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ tatu ku nibanawan, u ku ¶uŇčaj misur~…ĺitaj tu r~…ĺikisi atu misur~…ĺitaj tu kiwkaj tu nisakapańßan misaŇča Ē~ ° tu nikur~…ĺitanaj maazińß jadańß ku masazumaaj a zazan.
S.FORM: śúÄŚĺĆÁöĄśôöť§ź"(Áĺ©Ś§ßŚą©Ť™ě:Il Cenacolo (il t Ée'naňźkolo) , L'Ultima Cena ('lultima 't Éeňźna)) . "sazikuzay a nikalabi" I-ta-li a kamu, Il Cenacolo (il t Ée'naňźkolo) , L'Ultima Cena ('lultima 't Éeňźna) u katinengan nu tademaw tabakiay a nikulitan tu nu cabengay, nilimaan nisulitan kacumelakan a mihcaan ci Aw-na-tu.Ta.wen-si mikulit i Mi-lan kingsikiw manamuh ci Ma-li-yaan tuw-min-wou-huy-yen a pikanan a cabengan. 1980 a mihcaan, nikulitan "sazikuzay a nikalabi" tu kanamu ci Ma-li-yaan mapasisil u zaysang nu kitakit. misanga tu likisiŚČĶšĹúś≠∑ŚŹ≤ 463 a mihcaan u misangaay patizengay a saydan ci Su-la-li misakapah patizeng manamuh tu kanamuhan a Ma-li-ya a to-min wo-huy-yen. 470 a ziday kakitaan ci Lu-to-wi-ke.S-bu-al-ca, paahebal patizeng tu kalecapuan. kakitan miawza tu itawyaay 28 ku mihcaan mikutikay Ta-wen-si atu zumaay a tademaw ci Mi-lan-nu misanga'ay patizengay a saydan ci Pow-la-mung-te mapulung miseyki, ci Pow-la-mung-te u kalecapuan nu pangkiw a kasamulmul nu zikuza nu luma' sumad han u talakaway a ainulian. zuma satu macusnus aca patizeng tu masasepatay a kalimucu' a salining, pikanan. 495 a mihcaan katukuh 1497 a mihcaan kaiza kakitaan ci Lu-to-wi-ke-Wang-wiy nupakazali i sasingalana, ci Ta-wen-si mipili' tu pikanan amisan a cabeng misa nga' mikulit tu nipaliayaw niza u matenesay tu a nikulitan u "sazikuzay a nikalabi", pasu u sapikulit a kulit nisanga'an niza, nu malalamelay a kuli atu kulitay a ti'kuk nu malalamela a sapikulit, acaay ku nu tebanay a kasumamadan a mihcaan hatu u mahiniay ku maiyungay u masenget ku sasakulitan mikulit tu cabengay. uyni a sakulit mapalalamel tu nu zumaay, u sakatineng u ti'kuk atu nguling, atu ci Ta-wen-si duhepic ku nipakulit, u "sazikuzay a nikalabi" i zikuz nu 50 a mihcaan zayhan malalemed amalingatu pihaceng ku katupelak, u picudadan tu nu kiwkayay sadakaydakay kinapina tu misakapah misanga' tuyni a nikulitan. 796 . 1652 a mihcaan i kalecapuan i cabengan misazazan tu adidi'ay a panan, namahiza i nikulitanay a YE-su atu tuluay nu mikilulay a kuku' ketunen tu. 796 a mihcaan Ba-kow a kangangayawan, Na-pow-lunay Ba-kow a hitay micalap tu Mi-lan, kalecapuan macalap nu Ba-lan-si u saayaway a masakaputay kapulungan a hitay nu kanatal, u nisulutan uyni a pikanan mala luma' tunu sumayu. 1943 a mihcaan sakatusa a ngangayawan, Mi-lan mapung nu makakanumay a hitay, malemeday a kalecapuan caay ka hamin mapeleng, amiading tu nikulitan, Ba-si-s I-tali a hitayan atu binawlan u nitabuan a liken, angngulu, sapad hamin nu cabeng masakapah tu miading, nazikuz namangangayaw misakapah masanga' ku maluyuhay nu zumaay a luma' zikuz, kya muliyaw pabinawlan tuynian a nikulitan. ayza a demiad miazihay tuniann nikulitan amaazih tu ku nu tawyaay niciluan a sasing. 1982 a mihcaan I-ta-li patizeng tu milisimetay misakapah a sakaput, i pipadang nu Olivetti, malingatu miyung tu nu ke-sya a kikay sapiedap mibanaw misakapah tu "sazikuzay a nikalabi", mitelungay misakapahay milekakawaway misakapahay ci Mi-lan u kucungay s cyaw-sow ci Pi-lin.Pu-la-mu-pi-la "Pinin Brambilla Barcilon". uyni a kawaw kanahatu pakaedem tu hekalay a tademaw katedes nu kakaydihan, nika a malilid nu kucungay amacaculi ku zuma, sisa matenes ku pisakapah, katukuh 1999 a mihcaan 3 a bulad kya muliya pabinawlan paazih tuyni a nikulitan. 2000 a mihcaan "sazikuzay a nikalabi" caay piuwac misakapah misanga', u hekalay sangalenb sa macaculi, uzuma miciliay nasa uyni nikulitan takelal tatu ku nibanawan, u kucungay misulitay tu likisi atu misulitay tu kiwkay tu nisakapahan misanga' tu nikulitanay maazih yadah ku masazumaay a zazan.

¶ab…ôŇč misa Ňča Ē~ ° mikur~…ĺit tu nipar~…ĺiajaw niza u mat…ôn…ôsaj tu a nikur~…ĺitan u "sazikuzaj a nikar~…ĺabi", pasu u sapikur~…ĺit a kur~…ĺit nisaŇča Ē~ °an niza, nu mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj a kur~…ĺi atu kur~…ĺitaj a ti Ē~ °kuk nu mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺa a sapikur~…ĺit, a ¶aaj ku nu t…ôbanaj a kasumamadan a mińß ¶aan ńßatu u mańßiniaj ku maijuŇčaj u mas…ôŇč…ôt ku sasakur~…ĺitan mikur~…ĺit tu ¶ab…ôŇčaj. ujni a sakur~…ĺit mapar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu nu zumaaj, u sakatin…ôŇč u ti Ē~ °kuk atu Ňčur~…ĺiŇč, atu ¶i ta-w…ôn-si duńß…ôpi ¶ ku nipakur~…ĺit, u "sazikuzaj a nikar~…ĺabi" i zikuz nu ** a mińß ¶aan zajńßan mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd amar~…ĺiŇčatu pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku katup…ôr~…ĺak, u pi ¶udadan tu nu kiwkajaj sadakajdakaj kinapina tu misakapańß misaŇča Ē~ ° tujni a nikur~…ĺitan. *** . **** a mińß ¶aan i kar~…ĺ…ô ¶apuan i ¶ab…ôŇčan misazazan tu adidi Ē~ °aj a panan, namańßiza i nikur~…ĺitanaj a j…ô-su atu tur~…ĺuaj nu mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj a kuku Ē~ ° k…ôtun…ôn tu. *** a mińß ¶aan ba-kow a kaŇčaŇčajawan, na-pow-r~…ĺunaj ba-kow a ńßitaj mi ¶ar~…ĺap tu mi-r~…ĺan, kar~…ĺ…ô ¶apuan ma ¶ar~…ĺap nu ba-r~…ĺan-si u saajawaj a masakaputaj kapur~…ĺuŇčan a ńßitaj nu kanatar~…ĺ, u nisur~…ĺutan ujni a pikanan mar~…ĺa r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tunu sumaju. **** a mińß ¶aan sakatusa a ŇčaŇčajawan, mi-r~…ĺan mapuŇč nu makakanumaj a ńßitaj, mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj a kar~…ĺ…ô ¶apuan ¶aaj ka ńßamin map…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč, amiadiŇč tu nikur~…ĺitan, ba-si-s i-tar~…ĺi a ńßitajan atu binawr~…ĺan u nitabuan a r~…ĺik…ôn, aŇčŇčur~…ĺu, sapad ńßamin nu ¶ab…ôŇč masakapańß tu miadiŇč, nazikuz namaŇčaŇčajaw misakapańß masaŇča Ē~ ° ku mar~…ĺujuńßaj nu zumaaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° zikuz, kja mur~…ĺijaw pabinawr~…ĺan tujnian a nikur~…ĺitan. ajza a d…ômiad miazińßaj tuniann nikur~…ĺitan amaazińß tu ku nu tawjaaj ni ¶ir~…ĺuan a sasiŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan i-ta-r~…ĺi patiz…ôŇč tu mir~…ĺisim…ôtaj misakapańß a sakaput, i pipadaŇč nu or~…ĺi*…ôtti, mar~…ĺiŇčatu mijuŇč tu nu k…ô-sja a kikaj sapi…ôdap mibanaw misakapańß tu "sazikuzaj a nikar~…ĺabi", mit…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj misakapańßaj mir~…ĺ…ôkakawawaj misakapańßaj ¶i mi-r~…ĺan u ku ¶uŇčaj s ¶jaw-sow ¶i pi-r~…ĺin.pu-r~…ĺa-mu-pi-r~…ĺa "pinin brambir~…ĺr~…ĺa bar ¶ir~…ĺon". ujni a kawaw kanańßatu paka…ôd…ôm tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw kat…ôd…ôs nu kakajdińßan, nika a mar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu ku ¶uŇčaj ama ¶a ¶ur~…ĺi ku zuma, sisa mat…ôn…ôs ku pisakapańß, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad kja mur~…ĺija pabinawr~…ĺan paazińß tujni a nikur~…ĺitan. **** a mińß ¶aan "sazikuzaj a nikar~…ĺabi" ¶aaj piuwa ¶ misakapańß misaŇča Ē~ °, u ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj saŇčar~…ĺ…ônb sa ma ¶a ¶ur~…ĺi, uzuma mi ¶ir~…ĺiaj nasa ujni nikur~…ĺitan tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ tatu ku nibanawan, u ku ¶uŇčaj misur~…ĺitaj tu r~…ĺikisi atu misur~…ĺitaj tu kiwkaj tu nisakapańßan misaŇča Ē~ ° tu nikur~…ĺitanaj maazińß jadańß ku masazumaaj a zazan.
